comment.body: This is my understanding:: MMs are positive charm if it's time decay increases the magnitude of their delta exposure, they are in negative charm if it decreases the magnitude of their delta exposure. -- For example: If they are long OTM options charm is usually negative (as time decays these options have less delta) . If they are short ITM options charm is usually positve (as their delta exposure increases as time passes). If they were long ITM options do you think charm would be supportive? What if they were long OTM options?
comment.raw_body: This is my understanding:: MMs are positive charm if it's time decay increases the magnitude of their delta exposure, they are in negative charm if it decreases the magnitude of their delta exposure. -- For example: If they are long OTM options charm is usually negative (as time decays these options have less delta) . If they are short ITM options charm is usually positve (as their delta exposure increases as time passes). If they were long ITM options do you think charm would be supportive? What if they were long OTM options?
